title: verbascum alceoides
intro: Verbascum alceoides, also known as Alpine Mullein or Large Mullein, is a biennial plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that belongs to the genus Verbascum. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with the roots and leaves being utilized in various preparations. The medicinal properties of Verbascum alceoides have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
